title: Steam Rex doubles Atk damage after opponent Lightning

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. If your opponent plays a Lightning card, this creature inflicts 2x Atk damage the turn it was used.

plan.title: Steam Rex doubles Atk damage after opponent Lightning
plan.summary: Put Steam Rex on the field, have the opponent respond to a standard Magic card with Blade in the Dark, then verify Steam Rex's Atk damage is doubled in battle that turn.

notes: Set Steam Rex as player_1 primary creature.
Player_1 plays Test Standard Magic so player_2 can respond with Blade in the Dark.
After the Lightning response resolves, Steam Rex battles during the same turn.

steps: Player_1 plays a standard Magic card.
Player_2 responds with Blade in the Dark as a Lightning card.
Start a battle with Steam Rex as the attacker.
Verify Steam Rex's Atk damage multiplier applies.

expectedAssertions.label: Steam Rex damage multiplier is present

manualVerification: Confirm Steam Rex only receives the 2x Atk damage boost after the opponent plays a Lightning card.
Confirm the boost is limited to the turn the Lightning card was used.
riskNotes: This fixture uses Blade in the Dark as the opponent Lightning response to avoid extra damage side effects from Lightning Strike.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Steam Rex's current-turn 2x Atk damage after the opponent plays Lightning.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
